title: Caregiver - Caregiver Profile Edit (20 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-417: Caregiver can view and edit their profile. Validates profile summary display (AC1), tabs (AC1), Edit Profile editable/read-only fields (AC2), Save Changes with validation (AC3), Cancel discards changes (AC4), data validation rules (AC5).

testCases.title: Caregiver can navigate to profile page
steps: Verify URL contains /profile or page has profile content.
expectedResults: Caregiver navigates to the profile page.

testCases.title: Profile summary displays Full Name and Email
steps: Verify page body contains a name.
Verify page body contains an email address.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the profile page.
expectedResults: Full Name and Email are displayed.

testCases.title: Profile summary displays Location and Caregiver Type
steps: Verify page body contains location text.
Verify page body contains caregiver type or relationship info.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the profile page.

testCases.title: Profile tabs are visible
steps: Verify tabs for Profile, Wishlist, Inquiries, Settings are visible.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the profile page.

testCases.title: Edit Profile and Export Data CTAs visible
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the profile page.

testCases.title: Clicking Edit Profile makes fields editable
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the profile page.

testCases.title: Editable fields include Name, Phone, Location, Role, Relationship, Experience
steps: Verify fields for name, phone, location, role, relationship, experience.

testCases.title: Email and Aadhaar fields remain read-only
expectedResults: Email and Aadhaar are not editable.

testCases.title: Save Changes button is visible in edit mode
steps: Verify Save Changes button is visible.

testCases.title: Clicking Save Changes shows success confirmation
Profile view refreshes with updated values after save
steps: After saving, verify profile shows updated values.
Verify page is no longer in edit mode.

testCases.title: Cancel button is visible in edit mode
Clicking Cancel discards unsaved changes
steps: Verify profile reverts to last saved state.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is in edit mode with unsaved changes.

testCases.title: Phone number must be valid numeric
steps: Verify it accepts only numeric input or has validation.
expectedResults: Phone field validates for numeric input.

testCases.title: Caregiving experience must be numeric
steps: Verify it accepts only numeric input.
expectedResults: Experience field validates for numeric input.

testCases.title: Mandatory fields cannot be empty on save
expectedResults: Validation error shown for empty mandatory fields.

testCases.title: Page refresh after save retains updated values
steps: Verify profile still shows updated values.

testCases.title: Mobile viewport renders profile correctly
expectedResults: Profile page renders correctly on mobile.

testCases.title: Profile page has correct heading
steps: Verify page has heading containing 'profile' or caregiver name.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the profile page.

testCases.title: Back navigation from profile works
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the profile page.
